my_thoughts: My intent says 'Shift their frame...' but the student is in identifying_imagination_as_reality_test. Am I trying to shift their frame or are they already shifting? The subject_object_inversion mechanism suggests I'm doing something, but maybe they're doing it to themselves and I'm just naming it.
accumulated_insight: T3: Student 'The worry with me is that I am prone to denying existence to what I cannot imagi'—transitions testing limitations of claim to identifying imagination as reality test. Teacher applies subject object inversion with reverses criterion, defines unreality. Mid-episode in UNMAKING phase, building toward resolution. Previous none from T2 led to this shift.
visible_response:
You would be wiser to deny the existence of what you imagine.
It is the imagined that is unreal.
